hero.headline: Factory-Direct Excavator Attachments Built for Canadian Winters
hero.subheadline: Q355 HSLA steel bodies with Hardox 450 wear parts. Shipping coast-to-coast across Canada. Sub-zero certified.

features.subzeroDesc: Q355 manganese steel with Charpy V-notch impact rating to −40°C. Built to perform when competitors crack.
features.oemDesc: ISO 9001 certified production. Every weld inspected ultrasonically. Same tolerances as OEM replacement parts.
features.factoryDesc: Cut out the middleman. Our 60,000 m² source facility ships direct to your jobsite across Canada.
features.deliveryDesc: Warehouse stock in Ontario. Most in-stock orders ship within 3–5 business days anywhere in Canada.

cta.title: Ready to Spec Your Next Attachment?
cta.subtitle: Tell us your carrier brand, tonnage, and application — we'll match you to the right attachment.

origin.title: 20 Years of Manufacturing Excellence
origin.subtitle: Our source facility has been supplying heavy equipment attachments to global markets for over two decades — now shipping factory-direct to Canada.

about.factoryP1: Our 60,000 m² production campus houses the full manufacturing chain — from raw HSLA steel plate to finished, inspected attachment — under one roof. Robotic MIG welding stations, CNC plasma cutting tables, and precision boring mills operate three shifts, seven days a week.
about.factoryP2: Every structural weld undergoes ultrasonic inspection before the attachment reaches the paint booth. Only attachments that pass a 47-point quality checklist ship. This is not a trading company re-boxing imports — this is the source.
about.qaSubtitle: Four mandatory stages between raw steel and your jobsite. No shortcuts, no exceptions.
about.qa1Desc: Every steel plate arrives with mill certificates. Q355B and Hardox 450 grade verified before cutting begins.
about.qa2Desc: Ultrasonic testing on all structural welds during fabrication. Non-conforming welds are cut, re-welded, and re-tested.
about.qa3Desc: Pin holes, bracket spacing, and pin diameters measured against OEM carrier specifications before assembly.
about.qa4Desc: Finished attachments are load-tested to 1.5× rated capacity before packing. Documentation available on request.
about.tl2003: Facility founded with first-generation plasma cutting and manual welding lines.
about.tl2008: First export orders to Southeast Asia. ISO 9001 certification achieved.
about.tl2012: Robotic welding installed. Production capacity doubles. Hardox 450 wear plate adopted.
about.tl2016: CE marking achieved for European market. CNC boring mills added for precision pin work.
about.tl2020: North American market entry. Carrier compatibility database built for CAT, John Deere, Komatsu, Volvo, and Hitachi.
about.tl2024: Boreal Iron Heavy launches in Canada. Factory-direct shipping to all provinces.
about.timelineSubtitle: From a single plasma table to a 60,000 m² global facility — two decades of compounding capability.
about.ctaSubtitle: Q355B vs. ASTM A572 Grade 50 — side-by-side technical data.

footer.tagline: Factory-direct heavy equipment attachments. Q355 HSLA steel + Hardox 450 wear parts. Built for Canadian conditions.

pdp.weldDesc: All structural welds are performed by robotic MIG welding systems and ultrasonically inspected before shipment.

steel.title: Industrial Steel Specifications: Q355 vs. ASTM A572
steel.subtitle: Technical comparison demonstrating the standard structural performance of our imported manganese steel compared to North American benchmarks.
steel.compSubtitle: Standard specifications for Q355B and ASTM A572 Grade 50.
steel.charpyNote: Impact testing data provided as manufacturer typicals. Consult your engineer for site-specific requirements.
steel.ceDesc: Carbon Equivalent (CE) calculated per IIW standard to ensure welding compatibility with standard industrial structural steel.
steel.ceNote: CE < 0.43 indicates good weldability without pre-heat under most conditions.
steel.dualDesc: For heavy-wear zones (bucket floors, side cutters), we integrate Hardox 450 or equivalent wear-resistant plate.
steel.layer1Desc: High-strength low-alloy manganese steel forms the frame, side plates, and mounting brackets.
steel.layer2Desc: Abrasion-resistant plate welded to bucket floor, lip, and side cutters for extended service life.
steel.ctaTitle: Ready to Order or Need a Custom Spec?
steel.ctaSubtitle: Our engineering team can size and configure any attachment to your carrier model and application.
